user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Light, quick breakfast at the hotel (continental style) to fuel up before the 9:00 AM client meeting. Ideal for grabbing coffee, a pastry, yogurt, and fruit with minimal wait.

insertion_point.reasoning: Insert at position 0 so breakfast occurs before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting. Scheduled 8:00–8:30 AM to allow time to eat and walk to the meeting by 9:00 AM.
